title: Aberdeen presents 90s vs 00s: 18/04/26
description: 90s vs 00s: It’s time to settle the argument. Two eras. Two soundtracks. One gloriously chaotic game of Bongo’s Bingo. The 90s bring the anthems you grew up on — hands-in-the-air choruses, iconic pop moments and tunes that still absolutely go off. The 00s fire back with guilty pleasures, club classics and songs you know every word to, whether you admit it or not. All night long we’re putting them head-to-head with the tunes, the prizes and the bragging rights on the line. And yes, fancy dress ideas galore. Think double denim, shell suits and bucket hats versus velour tracksuits, trucker caps and low-rise chaos. If you’ve ever wanted an excuse to dress like a pop star, this is it.
